name: DISA STIG Microsoft Windows 11 V1R6 (subset)
_comment: Portfolio demonstration subset. Not a complete STIG-Viewer or Evaluate-STIG replacement. Controls span RegistryValue, AuditPolicy, ServiceState, SecurityPolicy, BitLockerStatus, and Manual types.

controls.title: The SMBv1 protocol must be disabled on the SMB client
controls.fix: Set HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\mrxsmb10 'Start' DWORD to 4 (Disabled) or disable the SMBv1 Client feature via: Disable-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName SMB1Protocol-Client

controls.title: The SMBv1 protocol must be disabled on the SMB server
controls.fix: Set HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\LanmanServer\Parameters 'SMB1' DWORD to 0, or run: Set-SmbServerConfiguration -EnableSMB1Protocol $false -Force

controls.title: Local Security Authority (LSA) Protection must be enabled
controls.fix: Set HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa 'RunAsPPL' DWORD to 1 via Group Policy: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Local Policies > Security Options > LSA Protection = Enabled

controls.title: Microsoft Defender Antivirus real-time protection must be enabled
controls.fix: Set HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Real-Time Protection 'DisableRealtimeMonitoring' DWORD to 0 via GPO: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > Microsoft Defender Antivirus > Real-time Protection > Turn off real-time protection = Disabled

controls.title: PowerShell Script Block Logging must be enabled
controls.fix: Set HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging 'EnableScriptBlockLogging' DWORD to 1 via GPO: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > Windows PowerShell > Turn on PowerShell Script Block Logging = Enabled

controls.title: The account lockout threshold must be configured to three or fewer invalid logon attempts
controls.fix: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Account Policies > Account Lockout Policy > Account lockout threshold = 3 or fewer invalid logon attempts

controls.title: Audit Credential Validation must be configured to audit both Success and Failure events
controls.fix: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Advanced Audit Policy Configuration > Account Logon > Audit Credential Validation = Success and Failure

controls.title: Audit Account Lockout must be configured to audit both Success and Failure events
controls.fix: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Advanced Audit Policy Configuration > Logon/Logoff > Audit Account Lockout = Success and Failure

controls.title: The Telnet Client must not be installed
controls.fix: Uninstall the Telnet Client feature: Disable-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName TelnetClient -NoRestart

controls.title: BitLocker Drive Encryption must be enabled on the system drive
controls.fix: Enable BitLocker on the system drive: Enable-BitLocker -MountPoint 'C:' -EncryptionMethod XtsAes256 -UsedSpaceOnly and configure a recovery key or TPM protector per site policy. This check assumes drive encryption is required by organisational policy.

controls.title: AppLocker policy must be configured and reviewed to control application execution
controls.fix: Review and configure AppLocker policies via Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Application Control Policies > AppLocker. Ensure Executable Rules, Windows Installer Rules, Script Rules, and Packaged App Rules are defined and enforced. Manual review required — rule sets vary by environment.

controls.title: Software inventory must be reviewed at least annually to remove unauthorised software
controls.fix: Perform an annual (or more frequent) review of installed software using: Get-Package, Get-WmiObject Win32_Product, or a software asset management tool. Remove or document any software not explicitly authorised by the organisation. Manual review required.
